chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-475 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 25.10.2016. Mr. Muntazir Mehdi Leghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Wasand Thari, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 8. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Muhammad Khan of P.S Mithi = Petitioner’s Counsel submits that petitioner being lady and belonging to a minority community has been continuously harassed and pressurized by private respondents for withdrawing her case from the Court of learned Judicial Magistrate at Mithi. Learned State Counsel submits that the said case has been challaned and the concerned Court has taken cognizance of it and the issue in the present petition about illegal detention of petitioner’s brothers will be decided by the concerned Judicial Magistrate. Be that as it may, the petitioner’s grievance about harassment can be redressed in this petition by directing the respondents not to cause any harassment in any manner whatsoever to the petitioner. The official respondents are further directed to provide protection to the petitioner and to ensure that she is not pressurized or harassed for withdrawing her case from the above Court. In view of the above observation, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
